name: meeting_reschedule_thread
description: Meeting scheduled, then rescheduled to new time

thread_emails.subject: Team Review Meeting - February 20th
thread_emails.body_text:
Hi team,

Let's meet to review our progress.

When: Friday, February 20, 2026
Time: 2:00 PM - 3:00 PM
Where: Conference Room C

Please confirm your attendance.

Sarah

thread_emails.subject: Re: Team Review Meeting - RESCHEDULED to February 23rd
thread_emails.body_text:
Hi team,

Due to a conflict, I need to reschedule our meeting.

NEW TIME:
When: Monday, February 23, 2026
Time: 10:00 AM - 11:00 AM
Where: Conference Room C (same room)

Sorry for the inconvenience.

Sarah

notes: Tests that rescheduled meeting updates existing event rather than creating duplicate
